question: what sensitive Art.9 signals exist for sample_creator
cypher:
MATCH (c:Creator {username:$creator_username})-[:HAS_SIGNAL]->(s:Signal {art9_risk:true}) RETURN s.name AS name, s.value AS value, s.method AS method, s.confidence AS confidence, s.art9_risk AS art9_risk
LIMIT 200
answer:
Art. 9 notice: results include special-category inferences. The sensitive Art. 9 signals for sample_creator are:
1. primary_niche: Fitness/Health (risk: true)
2. caption_sentiment: positive (risk: true)
